ingredients_text: Sweet Potato Chips (31%) [Sweet Potato (30%), Salt, Pepper, Dried Thyme], Portuguese Chicken (29%) [Chicken Breast (25%), Paprika, Chicken Flavoured Stock (Contains Flavour Enhancer (635), Food Acid (330)), Brown Sugar, Sweet Chilli Sauce (Contains Stabiliser (415)), Cajun Seasoning (Contains Acidity Regulator (330)), Dried Basil], Broccoli (13%), Peas (10%), Portuguese Chilli Sauce (8.5%) [Tomato Sauce (6%) (Tomatoes, Sugar, Food Acid (260), Salt, Onion, Spice Extract), Sweet Chilli Sauce (2%) (Contains Stabiliser (415)), Sriracha Sauce (Contains Stabiliser (415), Thickener (1422), Acidity Regulator (260), Natural Colour (160c)), Brown Sugar, Crushed Garlic, Cumin], Cottage Cheese & Feta Dressing (8.5%) [Cottage Cheese (5%) (Contains Milk, Preservative (202), Thickeners (412, 415, 410, 407a), Acidity Regulator (330)), Feta (1%) (Contains Milk, Mineral Salt (509)), Water, Crushed Garlic, Lemon Juice (Contains Preservative (223), Antioxidant (300)), Caster Sugar].
